caption: A man with short, styled blond hair wearing a pink ribbed tank top stands in an indoor basketball gym. The setting features a polished wooden court with green painted sections and blue protective padding along the walls. In the background, blue bleachers rise toward a white wall, and basketball hoops with white backboards are visible. The man is positioned in the foreground, facing the camera. He begins by looking directly forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his gaze and turns his head slightly to his right, moving his shoulder and torso in the same direction. By the end of the sequence, he has turned his head back toward the camera, glancing slightly to the side with a subtle smirk. No text, logos, or other people are visible in the scene.
